mapper.select: SELECT t.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_checklist_item i JOIN tb_checklist_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE c.template_id = t.id) AS item_count FROM tb_checklist_template t WHERE t.is_active = 1 AND (t.is_private = 0 OR t.is_private IS NULL) ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_checklist_template (template_name, description, category_type, result_options, sort_order, is_active, inspector_name, inspector_sign, inspector_sign_date, reviewer_name, reviewer_sign, reviewer_sign_date, approver_name, approver_sign, approver_sign_date, is_private, owner_type, owner_id, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{description}, #{categoryType}, #{resultOptions}, #{sortOrder}, 1, #{inspectorName}, #{inspectorSign}, #{inspectorSignDate}, #{reviewerName}, #{reviewerSign}, #{reviewerSignDate}, #{approverName}, #{approverSign}, #{approverSignDate}, #{isPrivate}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_checklist_template WHERE is_private = 1 AND owner_type = #{ownerType} AND owner_id = #{ownerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_checklist_template (template_name, description, category_type, result_options, sort_order, is_active, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{description}, #{categoryType}, #{resultOptions}, #{sortOrder}, 1, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_checklist_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, description = #{description}, inspector_name = #{inspectorName}, inspector_sign = #{inspectorSign}, inspector_sign_date = #{inspectorSignDate}, reviewer_name = #{reviewerName}, reviewer_sign = #{reviewerSign}, reviewer_sign_date = #{reviewerSignDate}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approver_sign = #{approverSign}, approver_sign_date = #{approverSignDate}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_checklist_category WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_checklist_category (template_id, category_name, sort_order) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{categoryName}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_checklist_item WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT i.* FROM tb_checklist_item i JOIN tb_checklist_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE c.template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY c.sort_order, i.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_checklist_item (category_id, item_no, classification, check_item, legal_basis, check_result, finding, action_deadline, action_complete, sort_order) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{itemNo}, #{classification}, #{checkItem}, #{legalBasis}, #{checkResult}, #{finding}, #{actionDeadline}, #{actionComplete}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_checklist_item SET classification = #{classification}, check_item = #{checkItem}, legal_basis = #{legalBasis}, check_result = #{checkResult}, finding = #{finding}, action_deadline = #{actionDeadline}, action_complete = #{actionComplete}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_checklist_item WHERE category_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_checklist_category WHERE template_id = #{templateId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_checklist_inspection WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY inspection_date DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_checklist_inspection WHERE risk_assessment_id = #{riskAssessmentId} AND template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_checklist_inspection (template_id, risk_assessment_id, inspection_date, department, inspector, site, status, remark, reg_user) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{riskAssessmentId}, #{inspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{department}, #{inspector}, #{site}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{regUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_checklist_inspection SET inspection_date = #{inspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, department = #{department}, inspector = #{inspector}, site = #{site}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, mod_user = #{modUser}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_checklist_inspection_result (inspection_id, item_id, result, action_deadline, person_in_charge, remark) VALUES (#{inspectionId}, #{itemId}, #{result}, #{actionDeadline,jdbcType=DATE}, #{personInCharge}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_checklist_inspection_result SET result = #{result}, action_deadline = #{actionDeadline,jdbcType=DATE}, person_in_charge = #{personInCharge}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
